title: Google Cloud Assured Workloads Workload
description: Schema for an Assured Workloads workload, representing a compliance-controlled environment on Google Cloud.

name.description: The resource name of the workload

displayName.description: User-assigned display name of the workload

complianceRegime.description: The compliance regime for the workload

billingAccount.description: The billing account associated with the workload

provisionedResourcesParent.description: The parent of the folder where resources are provisioned

createTime.description: The creation time of the workload

compliantButDisallowedServices.description: Services that are compliant but not allowed for the workload

Resource.description: A resource associated with the workload

resourceId.description: The numeric identifier of the resource
